facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this market. Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc is where locals actually shop, eat, and start their mornings. Fresh seafood straight off the boats. Street food stalls that don't have English menus. 4.3 stars from 401 reviews and zero resort markups. Get here before 8am. The good stuff disappears fast. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Vendors calling out, crabs stacked live, fish still moving. This is Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc before the tourist crowd arrives. 4.3 stars from 401 locals who know. Show up early.

items.placeName: EXMoney Phu Quoc Night Market | Currency Exchange

facebook.caption: POV: you land in Phu Quoc and realize you need dong before anything else. Skip the airport rip-off rates. EXMoney Phu Quoc Night Market at 10 Đường Nguyễn Trãi is rated 4.9 stars by 42 people who already made this mistake so you don't have to. Night market location means you sort your cash and start spending it in the same five minutes. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Phu Quoc with no dong is a bad start. 4.9 stars, night market location, no detour required. Exchange here first, thank yourself later.

facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this place. Locals shop here every morning. The day market on 49 Đường Ngô Quyền is where Phu Quoc actually buys its groceries, snacks, and fresh produce. No menus. No English signs. Just real island life at street level. If you want to understand a place, start with its market. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Locals filling baskets at 49 Đường Ngô Quyền while tourists queue at the resort buffet. This is the Phu Quoc day market. Real produce, real prices, real island. Go early.

instagram.caption: Tourists keep walking past this. Locals shop here every morning. The day market on 49 Đường Ngô Quyền is Phu Quoc unfiltered. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Baskets, fresh produce, zero tourists. The Phu Quoc day market hits different at 7am. Go before the crowds wake up.

tiktok.caption: Tourists skip this every day. Locals don't. 49 Đường Ngô Quyền, go early. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel #MarketFinds

items.placeName: Maharaja Lounge - 100% Pure Veg Authentic Indian Restaurant Sunset Town

facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 151 reviews. A 100% pure veg Indian restaurant inside Sunset Town, Phu Quoc.

Maharaja Lounge sits right beside Starbucks near the Kiss Bridge in An Thới. Authentic curries, no meat, no compromise. The kind of place vegetarian travelers usually can't find on this island.

If you're Indian, veg, or just craving real dal and roti after a week of seafood, this is your spot.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Steaming curry, fresh roti, zero meat. Maharaja Lounge in Sunset Town is pulling 4.9 stars for a reason. Pure veg Indian food in Phu Quoc actually exists, and it's right next to the Kiss Bridge.

instagram.caption:

Maharaja Lounge, Sunset Town. Next to Starbucks, beside the Kiss Bridge. Save this.
